response: Headquartered in Austin, TX, Acme Corp employs 342 people and generated $54.4 million in total annual revenue, reflecting an 18% year-over-year growth. Quarterly earnings fluctuated throughout the year, starting at $12.3 million in Q1, rising to $14.1 million in Q2, dipping to $11.8 million in Q3, and closing strong at $16.2 million in Q4.
